clientsort.name: ClientSort
editor.clientsort.autoOp.other.tooltip: The direction, for transfer operations ('0' for out (normal), '1' for in (reversed)).
editor.clientsort.autoOp.tooltip: An operation to automatically trigger when opening this inventory. The operation must be enabled.
editor.clientsort.disableButtons.tooltip: Disable all buttons and exit (requires confirmation).
editor.clientsort.instructions.tooltip.1: Click and drag to move buttons around, or use the arrow keys on your keyboard.
editor.clientsort.instructions.tooltip.2: Hold SHIFT while pressing the arrow keys to move faster.
editor.clientsort.instructions.tooltip.3: Right-click a button to show or hide it in the inventory menu.
editor.clientsort.instructions.tooltip.4: Hold SHIFT and right-click a button to enable or disable the operation.
editor.clientsort.instructions.tooltip.5: Left-click a slot to ignore it.
editor.clientsort.moveToDefault.tooltip: Move the buttons to their default offset positions.
editor.clientsort.reselect.tooltip: Select a different set of buttons.
editor.clientsort.saveAsDefault.tooltip: Save the current offset position as default (requires confirmation).
editor.clientsort.splitPolicy.tooltip: Create a separate policy for this inventory menu (requires confirmation).
editor.clientsort.toggleVisibility.toolt: Toggle the visibility of all buttons.
editor.clientsort.undoChanges.tooltip: Undo all unsaved changes made on this screen. Does not undo confirmed changes.
error.clientsort.classPolicy.classNotFou: Could not find a class matching name: %s
error.clientsort.classPolicy.parseOffset: Could not parse an offset from data: (%s,%s)
error.clientsort.classPolicy.pattern: Data does not match required pattern: %s
error.clientsort.triggerButton.duplicate: Each button can only appear once
extraSlotScope.clientsort.EXTRA.tooltip: Extra slots will be processed as a separate inventory.
extraSlotScope.clientsort.HOTBAR.tooltip: Extra slots will be processed as part of the hotbar.
extraSlotScope.clientsort.INVENTORY.tool: Extra slots will be processed as part of the main inventory.
extraSlotScope.clientsort.NONE.tooltip: Extra slots will not be processed.
hotbarScope.clientsort.HOTBAR.tooltip: Hotbar will be processed as a separate inventory.
hotbarScope.clientsort.INVENTORY.tooltip: Hotbar will be processed as part of the main inventory.
message.clientsort.checkLogs: Check game logs for more info.
message.clientsort.confirm.disableButton: If you want to re-enable the buttons later, you must either use the %s keybind while viewing an inventory, or visit the %s tab in mod configuration.
Are you sure you want to disable all buttons?
message.clientsort.confirm.saveAsDefault: Are you sure you want to save this button position as the default? If you want to reset the default position in future, you must do so via the main options menu.
message.clientsort.confirm.splitPolicy: This policy is currently specified by class '%s'. Are you sure you want to create a separate policy for class '%s'? If you want to revert this change in future, you must delete the new policy in the main options menu.
message.clientsort.installCloth: Install Cloth Config API to access mod options.
option.clientsort.allowSoundOverlap.tool: Whether to allow the previous sound to continue when starting a new sound.
option.clientsort.alwaysMatchByType.tool: Item-matching operations will always match items with the same type.
option.clientsort.anchorButtonsLeft.tool: Whether to anchor the buttons to the left side of the inventory.
option.clientsort.autoOpDelayContainer.t: The delay, in ticks, after which to perform automatic operations on a container when it is opened.
option.clientsort.autoOpDelayPlayer.tool: The delay, in ticks, after which to perform automatic operations on the player inventory when it is opened.
option.clientsort.bundlesUseLeftClick.to: In 1.21.2+, bundles use left-click to load, which can interfere with inventory actions. If playing on a 1.21.2+ server, enable this option.
option.clientsort.bundlesUseRightClick.t: In 1.21.1 and earlier versions, bundles use right-click to load, which can interfere with inventory actions. If playing on a 1.21.1 or earlier server, enable this option.
option.clientsort.classPolicies.tooltip: Each of the entries below corresponds to a particular type of inventory.
option.clientsort.endOverrideItems.toolt: When sorting, items in this list will always be sorted to the end.
option.clientsort.interactionInterval.to: The minimum time, in milliseconds, between interaction events when server acceleration is not in use.
option.clientsort.isolateKeybinds.toolti: If this is enabled, ClientSort will attempt to remove its own keybinds from Minecraft's map. This may help prevent conflicts, but may not be compatible with mods that alter the keybind system.
option.clientsort.layoutDefaults.tooltip: These values are used by policies that have the respective value set to '-'.
option.clientsort.optimizeCreativeSortin: Whether to improve performance of creative-order sorting by storing the order in memory.
option.clientsort.playSoundOther.tooltip: Whether to play sounds when performing other operations without server acceleration.
option.clientsort.playSoundSort.tooltip: Whether to play sounds when sorting without server acceleration.
option.clientsort.policies.description.1: The policy list below allows you to configure the keybind and trigger button operations for each inventory type.
Note: fill and transfer buttons are only shown if enabled on both the player inventory and the container.
option.clientsort.policies.description.2: This is provided as an alternative to the in-game editor, which can be opened using a keybind when viewing an inventory, or by right-clicking on a trigger button.
option.clientsort.policies.description.5: class: the full name of the inventory class or superclass.
option.clientsort.policies.description.6: offset: 'x,y', or empty to use the default.
option.clientsort.policies.description.7: status: '0' to disable the operation, '1' to only enable the keybind, '2' to enable both the keybind and the GUI button.
option.clientsort.policies.description.8: auto: '0' to disable, '1'-'4' to trigger an operation. dir: '0' for the normal direction (out), '1' for reversed (in).
option.clientsort.policies.description.9: ignored slots: a list of slots that should not be affected by operations.
option.clientsort.showButtonTooltips.too: Whether to show tooltips when hovering over buttons.
option.clientsort.showButtons.tooltip: Whether to show extra buttons on the GUI for inventory operations.
option.clientsort.showDebugInfo.tooltip: Whether to show debug info on the GUI and enable debug logging. Value will reset when you restart the game.
option.clientsort.soundInterval.tooltip: The minimum time, in milliseconds, between starting interaction sounds.
option.clientsort.soundPitchMax.tooltip: Final pitch of the interaction sound.
option.clientsort.soundPitchMin.tooltip: Initial pitch of the interaction sound.
option.clientsort.startOverrideItems.too: When sorting, items in this list will always be sorted to the start.
Items with any of the tags in this list will be matched by type only.
Only used if 'Always Match by Type' is disabled.
See %s for a list of tags.
option.clientsort.useClientFallback.tool: Whether to retry without server acceleration when a server-accelerated operation fails.
option.clientsort.useEndOverrides.toolti: If disabled, the list below will be ignored.
Whether to perform operations instantly in singleplayer and when the mod is installed on the server.
option.clientsort.useStartOverrides.tool: If disabled, the list below will be ignored.
payloadResult.clientsort.failure.inconsi: Server aborted and disabled this operation due to inconsistent inventory state.
payloadResult.clientsort.failure.invalid: Server rejected this operation due to invalid payload data.
payloadResult.clientsort.failure.unsuppo: Server does not support this operation in this inventory.
payloadResult.clientsort.unknown: Server returned an unrecognized failure code.
title.clientsort.groupSelector: ClientSort Editor - Select a Widget to Edit
